rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues (PINN definition mismatch, misnomer of 'spectral') and proposes specific reframing.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (DeepONet) but delta is not sharply articulated beyond performance metrics.
rationale.RX.1: Explicitly flags uncertainty regarding Reynolds numbers and dataset sources.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope, addressing methodological gaps and naming issues without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in original claims.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites and justifies changes with reasons.
